title: NYC Taxi Demand Forecast - Zone Heatmap

panels.title: NYC Demand Forecast - Latest Zone Heatmap
panels.description: Màu polygon thể hiện predicted_class cho từng TLC zone ở latest event window. Zone không có prediction trong latest window sẽ có màu xám nhạt.

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest AS (
    SELECT MAX(window_end) AS window_end
    FROM predictions_monitoring
)
SELECT
    zone_id,
    predicted_class,
    CASE predicted_class
        WHEN 0 THEN '0 - Không có'
        WHEN 1 THEN '1 - Rất thấp'
        WHEN 2 THEN '2 - Thấp'
        WHEN 3 THEN '3 - Trung bình'
        WHEN 4 THEN '4 - Cao'
        WHEN 5 THEN '5 - Rất cao'
        ELSE 'Không rõ'
    END AS demand_label,
    ROUND(pred_confidence::numeric, 3) AS confidence,
    used_model AS model,
    COALESCE(model_version, 'n/a') AS model_version,
    window_end
FROM predictions_monitoring
JOIN latest USING (window_end)
ORDER BY zone_id
SELECT MAX(window_end) AS latest_window FROM predictions_monitoring
SELECT COUNT(*) AS zones_predicted FROM predictions_monitoring WHERE window_end = (SELECT MAX(window_end) FROM predictions_monitoring)
SELECT GREATEST(263 - COUNT(*), 0) AS missing_zones FROM predictions_monitoring WHERE window_end = (SELECT MAX(window_end) FROM predictions_monitoring)
SELECT ROUND(AVG(pred_confidence)::numeric, 3) AS avg_confidence FROM predictions_monitoring WHERE window_end = (SELECT MAX(window_end) FROM predictions_monitoring)
SELECT MAX(predicted_class) AS peak_demand FROM predictions_monitoring WHERE window_end = (SELECT MAX(window_end) FROM predictions_monitoring)

WITH levels AS (
    SELECT generate_series(0, 5) AS predicted_class
), latest AS (
    SELECT MAX(window_end) AS window_end
    FROM predictions_monitoring
)
SELECT
    CASE levels.predicted_class
        WHEN 0 THEN '0 - Không có'
        WHEN 1 THEN '1 - Rất thấp'
        WHEN 2 THEN '2 - Thấp'
        WHEN 3 THEN '3 - Trung bình'
        WHEN 4 THEN '4 - Cao'
        WHEN 5 THEN '5 - Rất cao'
    END AS level,
    COUNT(p.zone_id) AS zones
FROM levels
CROSS JOIN latest
LEFT JOIN predictions_monitoring p
    ON p.predicted_class = levels.predicted_class
   AND p.window_end = latest.window_end
GROUP BY levels.predicted_class
ORDER BY levels.predicted_class

panels.title: Demand Level Trend - Last 24h Event Time

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    window_end AS "time",
    SUM(CASE WHEN predicted_class = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "0 - Không có",
    SUM(CASE WHEN predicted_class = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "1 - Rất thấp",
    SUM(CASE WHEN predicted_class = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "2 - Thấp",
    SUM(CASE WHEN predicted_class = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "3 - Trung bình",
    SUM(CASE WHEN predicted_class = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "4 - Cao",
    SUM(CASE WHEN predicted_class = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "5 - Rất cao"
FROM predictions_monitoring
WHERE window_end >= (SELECT MAX(window_end) FROM predictions_monitoring) - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY window_end
ORDER BY window_end

SELECT
    zone_id AS "Zone",
    predicted_class AS "Demand",
    CASE predicted_class
        WHEN 0 THEN 'Không có'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'Rất thấp'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'Thấp'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Trung bình'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Cao'
        WHEN 5 THEN 'Rất cao'
    END AS "Label",
    ROUND(pred_confidence::numeric, 3) AS "Conf",
    used_model AS "Model"
FROM predictions_monitoring
WHERE window_end = (SELECT MAX(window_end) FROM predictions_monitoring)
ORDER BY predicted_class DESC, pred_confidence DESC, zone_id
LIMIT 15
